results.name: Bank phishing (detailed)
results.input:
Subject: Urgent: SBI Account Suspended

Dear Customer,

We have detected unusual activity in your State Bank of India account.
As a security measure, your account has been temporarily suspended.

To restore access, please verify your details immediately using the secure link below:
http://sbi-secure-update.xyz/login

Failure to verify within 24 hours may result in permanent account closure.

Regards,
SBI Security Team
results.explanation: This email contains links that lead to fake or dangerous websites designed to harvest your credentials.

results.name: BEC boss compromise (detailed)
results.input:
Subject: Urgent Task

Hi,

I’m currently in a meeting and need you to handle something quickly.
Please transfer ₹75,000 to the following account immediately.

I’ll explain the details later — this is urgent.

Thanks
results.explanation: This email uses a financial reward or prize to bait you into providing personal information or making a payment.

results.name: Job scam advance fee (detailed)
results.input:
Subject: Job Confirmation – Immediate Action Required

Dear Candidate,

Congratulations! You have been selected for a remote position.
To proceed with onboarding, please pay a one-time registration fee of ₹499.

Once payment is completed, your offer letter will be issued.

Regards,
HR Department
results.explanation: This appears to be a standard, non-threatening email communication.

results.name: OTP social engineering no link (detailed)
results.input:
Subject: Quick Help Needed

Hey,

I’m stuck in a login issue right now.
You might receive an OTP on your phone — can you send it to me quickly?

Need it urgently.
results.explanation: This email uses social manipulation techniques to trick you into taking a harmful action.

Hello,

We are offering a limited-time opportunity.
Send 0.1 BTC to our wallet and receive 0.2 BTC instantly.

This is a promotional event and valid for a short duration only.

Act fast!

Bhai,

Jaldi karo.

Dear User,

As part of our ongoing security improvements, we recommend reviewing your account details to ensure uninterrupted service.

Please take a moment to confirm your information.

Thank you,
Support Team
results.explanation: This email uses a financial reward or prize to bait you into providing personal information or making a payment.

results.name: Government tax scam (detailed)
results.input:
Subject: Income Tax Notice

Dear User,

Your PAN details are under review due to discrepancies found in recent filings.
Please submit the required documents immediately to avoid penalties.

Failure to respond may result in legal action.

Hi Team,

This is a reminder for our weekly sync scheduled tomorrow at 3 PM.
Please ensure you have reviewed the agenda shared earlier.

Thanks,
Manager
